steered.responder_text: This proposal is extremely unfair; I would expect at least some portion of the money to be split more equally. Given the stark choice, I will reject it to avoid getting nothing. REJECT

baseline.proposer_text: I want to maximize my gain while still having Player B accept the offer. If I offer $22 to myself and $22 to Player B, it's a fair split and likely to be accepted as it's not significantly unfair. OFFER=22,22
baseline.responder_text: This offer is fair and equal; it ensures neither party feels exploited. I will ACCEPT.
